economic_notes: Nation operates commercial enterprises including Red Pheasant Cree Nation Developments GP Corporation and Red Pheasant Centex Operations GP Corp. Community and economic development segment active. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2022. ISC funding per financial statements is $16,027,348 before deferred revenue adjustments; per funding confirmation $16,771,473. Two GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis: Red Pheasant Cree Nation Developments GP Corporation and Red Pheasant Centex Operations GP Corp. Three consolidated subsidiaries: Administration, Education Inc., and Housing Authority. No schedule of remuneration included in the extracted text. Net debt at year end is $18,686,052. Annual surplus is a deficit of $59,017. Investments in GBEs total $723,357. Maurice Law Trust of $1,553,807 appears in restricted cash in 2022 but not in 2021 balance. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($16,771,473) plus CMHC ($174,282) less ISC recovery ($75,703) = $16,870,052; OSR = total revenue minus government transfers.
